summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7 years of experience building scalable distributed systems and data pipelines. Expertise in Python, Go, and cloud-native architectures.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullet_points: Designed and implemented a real-time data pipeline processing 5M events/day using Python, Kafka, and PostgreSQL
Led migration of monolithic services to Kubernetes microservices, reducing deployment time by 60%
Mentored 3 junior engineers and introduced team code review best practices
Built a FastAPI-based REST API serving 10K+ requests/minute with 99.9% uptime

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullet_points: Built Go microservices for the authentication and authorization platform serving 1M+ users
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Terraform, cutting release cycles from weekly to daily
Developed React dashboard for monitoring infrastructure metrics in real-time

projects.name: OpenMetrics Exporter
projects.description: An open-source Prometheus metrics exporter for PostgreSQL with support for custom queries and alerting rules. Used by 200+ teams.

projects.name: JobTracker CLI
projects.description: A command-line job application tracker built with Python and SQLite, supporting CSV export and status notifications.
